user.title: Setup Petkit BLE Water Fountain
user.description: Select your Petkit water fountain device from the discovered BLE devices.

manual.title: Manual Device Setup
manual.description: Enter the MAC address of your Petkit water fountain.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Petkit BLE Device
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name} ({address})?

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Please make sure it's powered on and within range.

abort.no_devices_found: No Petkit BLE devices were found. Please make sure your device is powered on and in pairing mode.
abort.not_supported: This device is not a supported Petkit water fountain.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device.

init.title: Petkit BLE Options
init.description: Configure your Petkit BLE water fountain settings.

reset_filter.name: Reset filter
reset_filter.description: Reset the water filter life indicator

set_device_config.name: Set device configuration
set_device_config.description: Configure device settings like LED brightness and smart mode timing

smart_time_on.name: Smart mode on time
smart_time_on.description: Minutes for smart mode on duration

smart_time_off.name: Smart mode off time
smart_time_off.description: Minutes for smart mode off duration
